headline: Iran escalation + inflation data week. Metals strong, crypto weak, stocks volatile.

XAG-USD.note: Pullback from $80+ highs. G/S ratio compressed to 64. War premium intact.

XAU-USD.note: Near ATH. Heavy SELL signal pressure (1B/7S) but fundamentals strong. Central banks buying 1200+ tonnes/yr.

BTC-USD.note: Range-bound. Rejected at $71.5K multiple times. $66K is critical support. Whale distribution detected.

ETH-USD.note: Weak relative to BTC. ETH/BTC at multi-year lows. BUY signals present but regime is ranging.

trade_ideas.rationale: Silver at $72 in pullback from $80+ highs. G/S ratio at 64 (below 20yr mean of 70) confirms silver outperformance. War premium, industrial demand (solar/EV/AI), and supply deficit intact. Main risk: Iran de-escalation could reduce safe-haven bid.

Gold at $4,642 with heavy SELL pressure from signals (1B/7S). BUT fundamentals are strongest ever — central bank buying, GLD inflows, safe-haven demand from Iran war. Short-term correction likely, long-term bullish. Wait for pullback to $4,577 support before adding.

BTC at $67.4K showing BUY signals (5B/2S) but price rejected at $71.5K resistance multiple times. Whale distribution to altcoins suggests potential distribution phase. Strong jobs data may pressure crypto via hawkish repricing. Wait for either $71.5K breakout or $64K support test.

week_ahead_catalysts: MON Apr 6: Markets reopen. Weekend Iran escalation (Kuwait strike, Hormuz ultimatum) could gap oil up $5-10.
TUE Apr 7: US Durable Goods Orders. Trump 8PM ET deadline/address on Iran — watch for USD volatility.
THU Apr 9: Core PCE (Fed's preferred inflation gauge, forecast 0.4% MoM). FOMC Meeting Minutes. HIGH VOLATILITY DAY.
FRI Apr 10: US CPI (Core CPI forecast 0.2% MoM). Hot prints could trigger sell-off given elevated oil prices feeding inflation.
system_improvements_shipped: BUG-164: Added per-ticker consensus accuracy gate — AMD (24.8%), GOOGL (31.3%), META (34.2%) now force-HOLD
Tuned ranging regime signal weights: fibonacci 1.8x, mean_reversion 1.7x, ministral 1.4x, macd 1.3x, momentum 1.3x
BUG-165: Gated smart_money in trending-down (was 10.0% accuracy, 130 samples — worst signal in system)
risk_warnings: CRITICAL: Iran-Hormuz crisis could cause massive oil gap Monday. Hold no large leveraged positions over weekend.
HIGH: Core PCE + CPI this week — hot prints in a high-oil environment could trigger aggressive sell-off across all risk assets.
HIGH: 11/30 signals have <45% recent accuracy. System reliability is reduced in this regime. Trust only fibonacci, mean_reversion, ministral, calendar, bb, macd.
MEDIUM: Fibonacci PARADOX detected — 68.2% recent (110 samples) but 41.4% in regime-ranging (1774 samples). The 1.8x boost may need revision.
MEDIUM: Econ_calendar is a phantom top-performer — 32.0% in ranging, 15.4% in trending-up. 66.9% alltime inflated by 'unknown' regime bucket.
research_highlights: HMM-based regime detection (hidden-regime PyPI package) could improve regime transitions over current EMA-based detection
RAM-Net meta-learning: weight historical accuracy by regime SIMILARITY not just recency — revolutionary for our blend function
Walk-forward Bayesian optimization would auto-tune REGIME_WEIGHTS, ACCURACY_GATE_THRESHOLD, _CORRELATION_PENALTY every 30 days
Z-score mean-reversion signal + OU half-life monitoring could extend our already-strong mean_reversion module
Kelly-VAPS volatility-adjusted position sizing: 0.25x fractional Kelly with ATR — proven Sharpe 2.88 on gold futures
